---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    output-file: "Frenken_Robert_CV_Compact.pdf"
    margin:
      x: 0.5in
      y: 0.4in
    fontsize: 9.5pt
    columns: 1
    keep-typ: false
---

```{=typst}
// Color theme
#let accent = rgb("#bb0000")
#let link-color = rgb("#333333")

// Custom header — name centered, contact row with unicode symbols
#align(center)[
  #text(size: 18pt, weight: "bold")[Robert A. Frenken] \
  #v(3pt)
  #text(size: 9pt)[
    ✉ #link("mailto:frenken.2@osu.edu")[frenken.2\@osu.edu]
    #h(0.8em) 📍 Columbus, OH
    #h(0.8em) 🌐 #link("https://robertfrenken.github.io")[robertfrenken.github.io]
  ]
  #v(2pt)
  #text(size: 9pt)[
    #link("https://github.com/RobertFrenken")[GitHub]
    #h(0.6em) · #h(0.6em)
    #link("https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-frenken/")[LinkedIn]
    #h(0.6em) · #h(0.6em)
    #link("https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_VbkYiwAAAAJ")[Google Scholar]
  ]
]

#v(6pt)

// Helper function for section headings
#let section(title) = {
  v(6pt)
  text(size: 11pt, weight: "bold", fill: accent)[#upper(title)]
  v(-2pt)
  line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.5pt + accent)
  v(4pt)
}

// Helper for CV entries: title on left, date on right
#let entry(title, org, date) = {
  grid(
    columns: (1fr, auto),
    column-gutter: 8pt,
    text(weight: "bold", size: 10pt)[#title],
    text(style: "italic", size: 9pt)[#date],
  )
  if org != none {
    text(style: "italic", size: 9pt)[#org]
  }
  v(2pt)
}

// Make all links use link-color
#show link: set text(fill: link-color)

#section("Education")

#entry("Ph.D. in Industrial & Systems Engineering", "The Ohio State University | Columbus, OH", "August 2021 – Present")
#entry("M.S. in Industrial & Systems Engineering", "The Ohio State University | Columbus, OH", "May 2024")
#entry("B.S. in Industrial & Systems Engineering", "The Ohio State University | Columbus, OH", "May 2021")

#text(weight: "bold", size: 9pt)[MS GPA: 3.83 / BS GPA: 3.63]

#section("Professional Experience")

#entry("Graduate Research Assistant", "Center for Automotive Research | The Ohio State University", "2024 – Present")

#list(
  indent: 12pt,
  body-indent: 4pt,
  [Developing a classification model for distinguishing attack-free and malicious messages within a CAN bus system. This supervised ensemble model combines VGAE and GAT.],
  [Created a federated learning testing bed configurable to be either centralized or decentralized, with the ability to change dataset, model, graph topology, and aggregation strategy. Part of a larger project to simulate edge devices and test model performance and convergence of non-IID data distributions.],
)

#entry("Graduate Research Assistant", "Spine Research Institute | The Ohio State University", "2021 – 2024")

#list(
  indent: 12pt,
  body-indent: 4pt,
  [Created multiple supervised and unsupervised machine learning models to classify lower back pain from wearable data of over 1000 participants. The supervised ensemble CNN model was able to correctly classify low back pain patients and controls with 90% accuracy.],
)

#entry("Data Science Intern", "Ford Motor Co. | Columbus, OH (Remote)", "2020")

#list(
  indent: 12pt,
  body-indent: 4pt,
  [Leveraged HPC tools (Spark, Hadoop, HIVE, SQL) and Python to query, merge, and aggregate trip data.],
  [Developed a decision tree model analyzing the correlation between oil life efficiency and the rate of warranty repair.],
)

#entry("Machine Learning Research Assistant", "The Ohio State University | Columbus, OH", "2020 – 2021")

#list(
  indent: 12pt,
  body-indent: 4pt,
  [Programmed web-scraping program to automate the extraction of weekly player metrics on FanDuel, pulling results into a building database. Data analysis including clustering and user sentiment analysis was conducted to help users make informed decisions when picking a lineup.],
)

#entry("Quality Systems Data Analyst Co-op", "Momentive | Columbus, OH", "2019")

#list(
  indent: 12pt,
  body-indent: 4pt,
  [Created a data pipeline with Excel and Python to understand HVAC metrics, production yields, and machine reliability. Quality team continues using data pipeline to track manufacturing metrics.],
)

#entry("Project Engineering Co-op", "DuPont | Columbus, OH", "2018")

#list(
  indent: 12pt,
  body-indent: 4pt,
  [Executed 12 capital projects, totaling over \$1,000,000, on average saving 10% of projected budget.],
  [Worked in cross functional teams to install roller lifts, pallet yards, and pumps, meeting schedule driven deadlines.],
)

#section("Publications")

#list(
  indent: 12pt,
  body-indent: 4pt,
  [*R Frenken*, SG Bhatti, H Zhang, Q Ahmed (2025) "KD-GAT: Combining Knowledge Distillation and Graph Attention Transformer for a Controller Area Network Intrusion Detection System" _IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITSC)_ (to appear).],
  [*R Frenken*, SG Bhatti, H Zhang, Q Ahmed (2025) "Multi-Stage Knowledge-Distilled VGAE and GAT for Robust Controller-Area-Network Intrusion Detection" _Proceedings of AAAI 2026_ (under review).],
)

#section("Projects")

#entry("Center for AI Safety (CAIS) 2025 Capstone Project", none, "2025")

C Leet, *R Frenken*. Tacit Coordination: Coordination without Communication

#list(
  indent: 12pt,
  body-indent: 4pt,
  [Empirical investigation of how large language models (LLMs) interact in game-theoretic scenarios, including prisoner's dilemma, battle-of-the-sexes, and duopoly market scenarios.],
)

#entry("Web Developer: Mobility Systems Lab Website", "The Ohio State University", "")

#link("https://osu-car-msl.github.io/lab-setup-guide/")

#section("Skills & Training")

#grid(
  columns: (auto, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 10pt,
  row-gutter: 5pt,
  text(weight: "bold", size: 9pt)[Coursework:],
  [High Performance Computing, Nonconvex Optimization, Computer Vision, Human Centered ML, Reinforcement Learning, Data Mining, Machine Learning, Data Structures & Algorithms, Database Design, Linear & Non Linear Programming, Statistics.],
  text(weight: "bold", size: 9pt)[Technical:],
  [Python, AWS, Azure, Java, SQL, MATLAB, HTML, CSS, Excel.],
  text(weight: "bold", size: 9pt)[Additional:],
  [Eagle Scout],
)

#section("Service")

#list(
  indent: 12pt,
  body-indent: 4pt,
  [*Reviewer*, ITSC 2025],
  [*Reviewer*, AAAI 2025],
)

#section("Mentorship")

#entry("Hanqin Zhang", none, "January – August 2025")

Currently M.S. at Georgia Tech.
```
